highlights.title: Architected a scalable SPA
highlights.description: Built with React + TypeScript, implementing client-side routing via React Router — eliminating full-page reloads and delivering a snappy, app-like browsing experience across menu, cart, and about pages.

highlights.title: Engineered global state with Redux Toolkit
highlights.description: Designed a cart slice with dispatch-action-selector pattern, ensuring predictable, bug-free state updates across the entire app without prop-drilling.

highlights.title: Boosted performance via lazy loading & code splitting
highlights.description: Dynamically imported heavy components so users only download what they need, reducing initial bundle size and improving load times.

highlights.title: Shipped with a real test suite
highlights.description: Used Jest + React Testing Library — wrote unit and integration tests, mocked fetch calls, and wrapped state-driven tests in act() for reliable async coverage.

highlights.title: Integrated Google Gemini AI with TMDB
highlights.description: Users type a natural language prompt, Gemini interprets intent, and the app fetches real movie results from TMDB — bridging AI and live data in one seamless flow.

highlights.title: Built end-to-end Firebase authentication
highlights.description: Sign up, sign in, profile updates, and protected routing with secure session management so unauthenticated users are always redirected appropriately.

highlights.title: Engineered reusable custom hooks
highlights.description: nowPlayingMovies, usePopularMovies, and trailer data hooks cleanly separate data-fetching logic from UI, keeping components lean and the codebase easy to scale.

highlights.title: Shipped to production on Firebase Hosting
highlights.description: Implemented memoization for performance, multi-language support, responsive design via Tailwind, and secured API keys via environment variables — production discipline from day one.

highlights.title: Implemented debounced live search with API caching
highlights.description: Each unique query is stored in Redux so repeated searches never hit the network twice — cutting unnecessary API calls and keeping the UI instant and smooth.

highlights.title: Integrated YouTube Data API
highlights.description: Fetched real video feeds, trending content, and video metadata — rendering a pixel-faithful home feed, search results page, and video watch page with live data.

highlights.title: Built recursive nested comments
highlights.description: Used a self-referencing component pattern so each comment thread can expand infinitely deep, mirroring YouTube's real comment UX without any third-party library.

highlights.title: Managed all app state with Redux Toolkit
highlights.description: Video data, search cache, and sidebar toggle live in dedicated slices — keeping components stateless, predictable, and easy to test with React Testing Library.
